subject: Armored soldiers march through a dense fog, barely visible through bare trees and thick mist; figures are indistinct and partially obscured
description: A scene of mist-shrouded warriors moving through a foggy, skeletal forest. The foreground is framed by bare dark tree branches. Two armored figures are visible in the middle ground — the nearer one clearly holding a long polearm or spear, wearing a visored helmet. A second smaller figure is visible further back in the fog. Both are heavily obscured by the dense white-grey mist. The overall palette is an almost monochrome grey-beige, with minimal color differentiation. The mood is eerie and disorienting — visibility is zero, threat is invisible.
foreground: bare tree branches framing the scene
background: dense white-grey fog, more armored figures fading into mist
emotion: tense, disoriented; soldiers march blind through concealing fog
